title: 1 Set of Nail Clippers Kit Nail Grooming Kit Manicure Set for Men and Boys, As a Gift for Nail Care(7 PCS, Blue)
features: Quality Material: Nail Scissors Set made of Stainless Steel, hard and durable easy to cut the nail & hair
Multi-Functions: Has so many functions including hand care, foot care and facial care that it can meet the various care needs in your daily life
Easy to Use: The 7 Piece nail clipper manicure set comes with a portable synthetic leather case that is easily opened with a push of a button
Portable & Lightweight: It is very lightweight so you can carry it with you in your bag everyday or pack it with you when you go travelling
Perfect Gift: The Manicure Set Case comes with an aesthetic packaging design. The case is made of high quality fabric and PU leather, which is stylish and elegant and makes for a great gift
